Our Story

More Than A Gym. A Transformation Lab.

Founded in 2025 in the heart of Choodasandra, Amrita International Multi Gym was built on a simple belief — that world-class fitness should be accessible to everyone, from first-time students at Amrita College to seasoned athletes.

We've built a space that's welcoming, inclusive and engineered purely for results — modern imported equipment, certified coaches and personalised programming, backed by a community that pushes you to become your strongest self.

⚡ Strength & Conditioning ♿ Fully Accessible ★ Certified Coaches ⬢ Modern Equipment
Mission

Make elite, personalised fitness accessible and inclusive for our community.

Vision

Bengaluru's most loved transformation destination.

What We Offer

Programs Built To Deliver

Every program is led by certified coaches and tailored to your level and goals.
